ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team (e.g., Atlanta Hawks) */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to (e.g., Eastern, Western) */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Atlantic, Central) */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays home games */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  "team_social_media" TEXT /* URL to the team's social media page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Whether the game went into overtime */,
  "location" TEXT /* Name of the location (stadium) where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., completed, postponed, canceled) */,
  "game_quarters" TEXT /* JSON representation of scores for each quarter */,
  "game_highlights" TEXT /* URL to game highlights */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_outcomes" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "winning_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning team */,
  "losing_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the losing team */,
  "overtime_periods" INTEGER /* Number of overtime periods played */,
  "final_score" TEXT /* Final score in a formatted string (e.g., "102-98") */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_outcomes_losing_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("losing_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_outcomes_winning_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("winning_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "winning_streak" INTEGER /* Current winning streak */,
  "conference_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team within its conference */,
  "division_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team within its division */,
  "home_wins" INTEGER /* Number of home wins */,
  "home_losses" INTEGER /* Number of home losses */,
  "away_wins" INTEGER /* Number of away wins */,
  "away_losses" INTEGER /* Number of away losses */,
  "point_difference" INTEGER /* Difference between points scored and points allowed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the standings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "head_to_head" (
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team */,
  "team1_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the first team */,
  "team2_wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the second team */,
  "total_games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played between the two teams */,
  "last_match_date" TEXT /* Date of the last match between the two teams */,
  "last_match_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the last match (e.g., "Team 1 won", "Team 2 won") */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team1_id", "team2_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., team administrator, coach, analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with (NULL for non-team users) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_log" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Whether the game went into overtime */,
  "location" TEXT /* Name of the location (stadium) where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., completed, postponed, canceled) */,
  "game_quarters" TEXT /* JSON representation of scores for each quarter */,
  "game_highlights" TEXT /* URL to game highlights */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedule" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game is scheduled */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Name of the location (stadium) where the game is scheduled */,
  "predicted_outcome" TEXT /* Predicted outcome of the game (e.g., "Team 1 win", "Team 2 win") */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., scheduled, postponed, canceled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)
